User Story: As a visitor I want a landing page that shows live/today's matches and entry points so I can start exploring.
Expected Behaviour: Renders hero; if configured fetches getLiveFixtures+getFixturesForDay+getHomeStats; shows live strip when live>0; today's fixtures grouped by league; feature grid; region explorer; how-it-works. Falls back to PreviewFixture placeholders and SetupNotice when unconfigured. Wraps data fetch in try/catch -> empty sections on DB error.
Edge Cases: DB down (catch -> empty); no fixtures today (empty state); stats null (shows em-dash and '1,200+'); >3 hero matches (sliced to 3)
Test Cases: TC-F001-1 happy: configured+live data renders live strip; TC-F001-2 empty: no fixtures -> LeagueFixtureGroups empty state; TC-F001-3 error: DB throws -> page still renders previews; TC-F001-4 unconfigured -> SetupNotice with correct chips
Notes: Server component; verified compiles & prerenders as static.

User Story: As a fan I want all of today's fixtures plus live and a region filter.
Expected Behaviour: gated on hasDbConfig; fetches today+live; live strip when live>0; LeagueFixtureGroups for today; region picker always shown; EmptyState when unconfigured.
Edge Cases: unconfigured (region picker still shown + empty notice); DB error caught -> []
Test Cases: TC-F002-1 happy; TC-F002-2 unconfigured shows region grid + empty state; TC-F002-3 region links route to /region/<slug>
Notes: Static prerendered.

User Story: As a fan I want all international competitions with upcoming+recent fixtures.
Expected Behaviour: If unconfigured: header + empty state early return. Else getInternationalLeagues, per-league upcoming(10)+recent(5); chip nav; only renders competitions with any fixtures; global empty state if none.
Edge Cases: no international leagues; all competitions empty (window empty state); off-season
Test Cases: TC-F003-1 happy; TC-F003-2 unconfigured early return; TC-F003-3 leagues exist but no fixtures -> window empty state
Notes: N+1 query pattern (per-league Promise.all) acceptable for small free-tier set.

User Story: As a user I want to search/filter the global player registry by name/club/nationality/position/club.
Expected Behaviour: getPlayersDirectory (cap 2000, sorted by rating then apps then pos then name); PlayersExplorer client: search input, position pills with counts, club dropdown, clear button, live result count, no-match message. emerging=age<=21.
Edge Cases: no players -> EmptyState; player with no club (excluded from club filter, still listed); no rating/apps (stable fallback sort); 1 vs many pluralization
Test Cases: TC-F004-1 search by name; TC-F004-2 filter by position; TC-F004-3 filter by club; TC-F004-4 combined filters -> clear resets; TC-F004-5 no results message; TC-F004-6 empty DB -> EmptyState
Notes: Per memory, registry currently empty due to scraped mock data; UI handles empty gracefully.

User Story: As a viewer I want to know which broadcaster shows each competition per country.
Expected Behaviour: getAllBroadcastersGrouped (CURATED/OFFICIAL); normalize to entries; fall back to BROADCASTER_SEED when DB empty/unconfigured; group by league then country; info banner; external stream links open new tab with rel noopener.
Edge Cases: DB empty -> seed fallback (league names show 'League <id>'); no entries at all -> EmptyState; stream/platform optional
Test Cases: TC-F005-1 happy DB data; TC-F005-2 seed fallback names; TC-F005-3 external link target/rel; TC-F005-4 no data EmptyState
Notes: Seed fallback shows numeric league names until synced (by design).

User Story: As a fan I want a league's upcoming fixtures, recent results, and standings.
Expected Behaviour: Validate id finite else notFound; getLeague else notFound; upcoming(30)+recent(15)+standings; if upcoming present show both, else lead with results + 'season break' note; standings sidebar with season label or empty state; country cross-link.
Edge Cases: non-numeric id -> 404; unknown id -> 404; no standings -> empty state; no upcoming -> demoted layout
Test Cases: TC-F006-1 happy; TC-F006-2 /league/abc -> 404; TC-F006-3 /league/999999 -> 404; TC-F006-4 no upcoming -> results-first layout; TC-F006-5 no standings -> empty state
Notes: SSG with dynamicParams=true.

User Story: As a fan I want every finished result for a league season grouped by day.
Expected Behaviour: Validate id/league; getLeagueSeasonResults (current season default); groupByDay using locale date; EmptyState when none.
Edge Cases: non-numeric/unknown id -> 404; no results -> empty state; season null
Test Cases: TC-F007-1 happy grouped by day; TC-F007-2 404 cases; TC-F007-3 no results empty state
Notes: groupByDay relies on incoming newest-first order.

User Story: As a fan I want a scoreboard, facts, broadcasters, and team links for a match.
Expected Behaviour: Validate id finite else notFound; fixture else notFound; scoreboard with score or kickoff time; HT/penalties line; status badge; facts (date/kickoff/venue/referee with TBD fallbacks); BroadcasterGrid (DB then seed then empty); team quick links.
Edge Cases: non-numeric/unknown id -> 404; no score -> shows time; only one of htHome/htAway set -> renders 'null'; missing venue/referee -> TBD; no broadcasters -> empty state
Test Cases: TC-F008-1 finished match score+HT; TC-F008-2 upcoming shows kickoff; TC-F008-3 404 cases; TC-F008-4 broadcaster seed fallback; TC-F008-5 partial HT data display
Notes: DEF-003 half-time line showed literal 'null' when only one HT value present; fixed to require both.

User Story: As a fan I want a team hero with standing stats, player-to-watch, squad, fixtures, and follow.
Expected Behaviour: Validate id/team; squad grouped GK/DEF/MID/ATT; PlayerToWatch (override else weighted compute); standing chips + form; FavoriteButton; upcoming/recent fixtures (demoted when no upcoming); venue card.
Edge Cases: non-numeric/unknown id -> 404; no squad -> empty state; no playerToWatch -> empty state; no standing -> chips hidden; no fixtures
Test Cases: TC-F009-1 happy full; TC-F009-2 404 cases; TC-F009-3 no squad empty; TC-F009-4 player-to-watch override vs computed label; TC-F009-5 follow toggle persists
Notes: Player-to-watch weighting goals*3+assists*2+rating*4.

User Story: As a user I want to browse leagues by region grouped by country.
Expected Behaviour: dynamicParams=false; generateStaticParams from REGION_ORDER; invalid slug -> notFound; WORLD -> international pseudo-country; else countries with synced leagues + today fixture count; EmptyState when unconfigured / no leagues.
Edge Cases: invalid region slug -> 404; unconfigured -> empty; region with no synced leagues -> scope empty state; today count pluralization
Test Cases: TC-F010-1 each region renders; TC-F010-2 /region/atlantis -> 404; TC-F010-3 WORLD international; TC-F010-4 empty scope message
Notes: All 7 regions prerendered at build.

User Story: As a user I want a country's leagues and today's fixtures.
Expected Behaviour: code lowercased; country else notFound; leagues (synced) ordered by priority; today's fixtures across league ids; breadcrumb to region; EmptyState for no leagues/no fixtures.
Edge Cases: unknown code -> 404; no leagues -> empty; no fixtures today -> empty; case-insensitive code
Test Cases: TC-F011-1 happy; TC-F011-2 /country/zz -> 404; TC-F011-3 uppercase code resolves; TC-F011-4 no fixtures empty state
Notes: Dynamic server-rendered.

User Story: As a user landing on a bad URL I want a friendly 404 with navigation.
Expected Behaviour: Renders branded 404 with home + fixtures links.
Edge Cases: broadcast via notFound() from dynamic routes
Test Cases: TC-F012-1 unknown route renders 404; TC-F012-2 links navigate
Notes: Static.

User Story: As an operator I want a secret-protected endpoint to trigger the daily sync.
Expected Behaviour: If CRON_SECRET set, require matching ?secret else 401; require API key+DB else 500; run runDailyDeepSync; 200 ok or 500 with message. nodejs runtime maxDuration 300.
Edge Cases: missing secret -> 401; missing env -> 500; sync throws -> 500 with msg; GET not allowed
Test Cases: TC-F013-1 no secret configured allows; TC-F013-2 wrong secret -> 401; TC-F013-3 missing env -> 500; TC-F013-4 success -> 200
Notes: Auth/env/error branches verified by static review (lint+type clean). Live POST deliberately NOT executed: it calls the metered API-Football endpoint and would consume the 100/day free-tier budget against a DB seeded with scraped mock data. Declared out-of-scope for automated QA per project's budget-gated design (CLAUDE.md core invariant).

User Story: As a user I want primary nav, region links (mobile), and active-state highlighting.
Expected Behaviour: Sticky header; NAV_LINKS; isActive via pathname.startsWith; mobile toggle with aria-expanded; region grid in mobile menu; closes on link click.
Edge Cases: root '/' exact match; startsWith collisions (e.g. /players vs none); menu open/close aria
Test Cases: TC-F014-1 active link highlight; TC-F014-2 mobile toggle opens/closes; TC-F014-3 aria-expanded reflects state
Notes: Client component.

User Story: As a user I want a live scrolling score strip under the navbar.
Expected Behaviour: Server fetches live+today (dedup, cap 24) when configured; else PREVIEW items; live count label; marquee duplicates list for seamless loop; cells link to match or /fixtures for preview ids.
Edge Cases: DB error -> preview; empty -> preview; preview ids negative -> link to /fixtures
Test Cases: TC-F015-1 live data renders; TC-F015-2 preview fallback; TC-F015-3 marquee loop; TC-F015-4 preview cell links to /fixtures
Notes: Sticky top offset 66px.

User Story: As a user I want footer navigation/branding.
Expected Behaviour: Static footer with links.
Edge Cases: none
Test Cases: TC-F016-1 renders links
Notes: Not deeply inspected; static.

User Story: As a user I want to follow teams persisted locally without auth.
Expected Behaviour: usePreferences reads/writes localStorage (key pitchscope:prefs:v1); toggleFavorite; setCountry; dispatches custom + storage events; hydrated flag prevents SSR mismatch; FavoriteButton toggles with aria-pressed.
Edge Cases: SSR (window undefined -> DEFAULT); corrupt JSON -> DEFAULT; cross-tab storage event; not hydrated -> shows Follow
Test Cases: TC-F017-1 toggle follow persists; TC-F017-2 reload restores; TC-F017-3 corrupt localStorage -> default; TC-F017-4 cross-component sync via event
Notes: DEF-001 (High) fixed: justified eslint-disable on intentional hydration. DEF-004 (Low) fixed: unused setCountry setter removed.

User Story: As a user I want country/nationality flags shown consistently.
Expected Behaviour: flagEmoji: stored emoji > special-flags > alpha-2 codepoint; image URL fallback; globe glyph last resort. flagForNationality maps free-text names.
Edge Cases: UK home nations; world; non-alpha2; URL flags; unknown nationality -> null/globe
Test Cases: TC-F018-1 alpha-2 emoji; TC-F018-2 special eng/scotland; TC-F018-3 URL fallback img; TC-F018-4 unknown -> globe
Notes: Large nationality map; data-dependent.

User Story: As a fan I want match status shown clearly (live/finished/abnormal/upcoming).
Expected Behaviour: Maps short codes: live pulsing (minute/HT/Pens), finished (FT variants), abnormal gold (PST/CANC/ABD/AWD/WO), else Upcoming.
Edge Cases: unknown status -> Upcoming default; AWD/WO show raw code label
Test Cases: TC-F019-1 live minute; TC-F019-2 FT/AET/PEN; TC-F019-3 postponed; TC-F019-4 unknown -> Upcoming
Notes: AWD/WO fall through to raw code in abnormal label.

User Story: As a fan I want a league table with form and zone highlighting.
Expected Behaviour: Multi-group support; columns P/W/D/L/GD/Pts/Form; responsive hidden cols; position color bar (CL<=4, Europa<=6, relegation=bottom 3 when table>=10); form last-5 dots.
Edge Cases: single vs multi group; small leagues/groups skip relegation coloring; null form -> dash
Test Cases: TC-F020-1 single group; TC-F020-2 multi group (UCL); TC-F020-3 form dots; TC-F020-4 small league zone coloring (now skipped <10); TC-F020-5 national-team rows show country flag instead of monogram
Notes: DEF-006/007 resolved: relegation zone computed from table size (bottom 3, gated >=10 rows). Country flags added next to team names for national-team competitions (flagForNationality; falls back to crest/monogram for clubs); nationality map extended (Bosnia, Iran, Iraq, Jordan, Qatar, Saudi Arabia). Verified live on /league/1.

User Story: As a user I want loading placeholders on slow dynamic routes.
Expected Behaviour: loading.tsx for league/match/team render skeletons during data fetch.
Edge Cases: none
Test Cases: TC-F021-1 skeleton shows on navigation
Notes: Static skeletons.

User Story: As an operator I want the UI to render without DB/API and tell me what to configure.
Expected Behaviour: hasApiConfig/hasDbConfig gate data fetches; env validated via Zod with safe fallbacks; SetupNotice shows missing pieces.
Edge Cases: invalid env -> console error + defaults; partial config
Test Cases: TC-F022-1 no env renders empty UI; TC-F022-2 setup notice chips reflect state
Notes: Verified: build succeeds; .env present in repo.

User Story: (Was latent) dropdown country selector.
Expected Behaviour: N/A - component removed.
Edge Cases: N/A
Test Cases: TC-F023-1 N/A (removed)
Notes: DEF-005 resolved: dead component deleted (was never imported/rendered). No references remain; lint+build green after removal.

User Story: As an operator I want budget-gated sync jobs to populate the DB.
Expected Behaviour: client.ts gates on daily budget; runner orchestrates leagues>fixtures+standings>squads; records SyncRun; resumes after budget exhaustion. squads.ts has unused var.
Edge Cases: budget exhausted mid-run; failed call not charged
Test Cases: TC-F024-1 budget gate (code-reviewed); TC-F024-2 lint clean
Notes: DEF-002 unused 'player' var warning in squads.ts:19 removed. Runtime behaviour not executed (would burn API budget).

User Story: As a developer I want a single reusable data-access layer so pages don't inline Prisma.
Expected Behaviour: src/lib/data/* and src/lib/utils export query/formatting helpers per CLAUDE.md convention. Some (getRegionOverview, getLeaguesGroupedByRegion, getBroadcastersForLeague, relativeDayLabel, shortTeamName) are not yet consumed by a page.
Edge Cases: unused exports are not user-facing; tree-shaken from client bundles
Test Cases: TC-F025-1 type-checks; TC-F025-2 lint clean (exported, not flagged)
Notes: Not defects: exported reusable helpers endorsed by CLAUDE.md as the place for read queries; redundant with a few inline page queries (match/region) but harmless. No user impact; left in place by design.

User Story: As a fan of a group tournament (World Cup/Euros/continental cups) I want to see each group's table even when standings aren't synced.
Expected Behaviour: getGroupStandings derives per-group tables from finished group-stage fixtures (round starts with 'Group'): played/W/D/L/GF/GA/GD/points/form, ranked within group by points>GD>GF>name. League page uses it as a fallback when no synced Standing rows exist. StandingTable renders one sub-table per group (groups.size>1).
Edge Cases: no finished group fixtures -> empty (keeps 'unavailable' empty state); partial results (mid-tournament) computed from played matches; null goals skipped; season resolved from currentSeason
Test Cases: TC-F026-1 World Cup (league 1) -> 12 groups x4 teams, correct points/GD/form (verified via probe); TC-F026-2 no group fixtures -> empty rows -> empty state; TC-F026-3 synced standings present -> computed NOT used
Notes: Reads only from Postgres fixtures (honours core invariant). Verified on /league/1: Groups A-L render, 'Standings unavailable' gone.

User Story: As a visitor I want each major competition to show relevant high-quality imagery in its page header, bright and clearly visible.
Expected Behaviour: leagueBackdrop matches league name substrings to images in /public/images and can set rendering hints (tint, opacity). World Cup mapped to the reigning champions photo (Argentina, 2022 final) rendered BRIGHT with NO lime tint (PageBackground tint=false -> skips floodlight wash, higher opacity, lighter left scrim). Falls back to 'pitch' theme (tinted) when unmatched.
Edge Cases: substring collisions (FIFA Club World Cup also matches 'world cup' - acceptable); tint=false still keeps a light left scrim for heading legibility; missing image -> broken img (asset committed)
Test Cases: TC-F027-1 /league/1 header uses worldcup-winner.jpg (verified live); TC-F027-2 no neon tint in bright mode; TC-F027-3 unmatched league -> tinted pitch fallback; TC-F027-4 image is valid high-res JPEG
Notes: Image: worldcup-winner.jpg (Argentina 2022 champions, CC BY 3.0, Wikimedia Commons), optimized to ~600KB. Bright/no-tint mode added to PageBackground (tint prop). Old 2014 images removed.
